mapper.sql: s.id, s.student_no, s.name, s.gender, s.birth_date, s.class_id, c.class_name as class_name, s.phone, s.address, s.parent_name, s.parent_phone, s.create_time, s.update_time, s.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_entity c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student ( student_no, name, gender, birth_date, class_id, phone, address, parent_name, parent_phone, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{classId}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{parentName}, #{parentPhone}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE student
name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, class_id = #{classId}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, parent_name = #{parentName}, parent_phone = #{parentPhone}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE student SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE student SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_entity c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND s.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.class_id ASC, s.student_no ASC
SELECT FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_entity c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId} AND s.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.student_no ASC
